Short CV

He was born in 1994. DEMİRTAŞ, who received his undergraduate education from Gümüşhane University Occupational Health and Safety Department in 2018, completed his master's education again in 2020 at Gümüşhane University Occupational Health and Safety Department. Nowadays, Esad Sadık DEMİRTAŞ, Health Services Vocational School Business He works as an Instructor in the Health and Safety Program.
